forbidden_states: Participant account outside the owner?s organization
required_states: AWS RAM organization sharing is enabled
Owner and participant accounts or organizational units are in the same AWS Organization
Subnet is not in a default VPC

conditions: The subnet is not in a default VPC.
The owner and participant accounts or organizational units are in the same AWS Organization.
Resource sharing is enabled through AWS RAM.
exclusions: Any subnet in a default VPC.
Sharing with accounts outside the owner account?s AWS Organization.

source_references.locator: Share your VPC subnets with other accounts; Shared subnet prerequisites; Working with shared subnets > Share a subnet
source_references.supported_proposition: Non-default Amazon VPC subnets are shareable through AWS RAM with accounts in the same AWS Organization.
VPC owners can share subnets only with accounts or organizational units in the same AWS Organization and cannot share subnets in a default VPC.

statement: The owner of an Amazon VPC subnet that is not in a default VPC can share that subnet through AWS RAM with accounts or organizational units in the same AWS Organization.
